market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Microsoft’s carbon removal plans aren’t dead after all
articles.description: Microsoft is responsible for over 90% of the carbon removal market, and reports suggested the company was pausing purchases entirely. This new deal should help assuage the fears of CDR startups.

articles.title: OpenAI claims it solved an 80-year-old math problem — for real this time
articles.description: OpenAI claims its reasoning model disproved a geometry conjecture unsolved since 1946 — and this time, the mathematicians who exposed its last embarrassing claim are backing it up.

articles.title: IrisGo, a startup backed by Andrew Ng, looks to become the AI desktop buddy you never knew you needed
articles.description: Initially billed as an "AI butler," Iris watches what happens on a user's desktop and automatically learns how to do tasks for them, its co-founder says.

articles.title: Price predictions 5/20: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, ZEC, BCH
articles.description: Bitcoin looks on track for a rally toward $80,000 while HYPE, ZEC and a handful of altcoins are pushing toward their range highs.

articles.title: Securitize remains in the red even as record quarter fuels public listing plans
articles.description: The tokenization platform reported record quarterly revenue but continued to post losses as it invested in growth and public-company preparations tied to its merger with Cantor Equity Partners II.

articles.title: Tesla’s Full Self-Driving software is creeping into Europe
articles.description: First came the Netherlands, now it's Lithuania. And more European countries appear to be in the queue for Tesla's driver-assistance system.

articles.title: Airbnb gets into hotels, expands AI for host onboarding and customer support
articles.description: Airbnb will soon let you book luggage storage and car rental services on its app.

articles.title: Latest Congressional swing at crypto tax reform would direct IRS to review de minimis exemptions
articles.description: The newest version of the Parity Act updates language around payment stablecoins and directs the IRS to report on how a de minimis exemption might work.

articles.title: Fairshake PAC’s $20M backing pays off in three US state primaries
articles.description: Five Republicans and one Democrat won or went to runoffs following primaries in Georgia, Alabama and Kentucky after a crypto-backed PAC and its affiliates spent a combined $20 million on media and ads.

articles.title: Global EV market goes K-shaped as the US gets left behind
articles.description: EV sales have surged worldwide in every region but the U.S., posing risks for legacy and startup automakers.

articles.title: Tether buys SoftBank’s stake in Bitcoin company Twenty One Capital
articles.description: The stablecoin issuer bought SoftBank’s 26% stake, expanding its control over the public Bitcoin holder as it moves into lending, mining and capital markets.

articles.title: OpenAI barrels toward IPO that may happen in September
articles.description: A day after Elon Musk lost his lawsuit that threatened OpenAI's structure, leadership, and finances, OpenAI is reportedly back to prepping for its IPO.

articles.title: Prediction markets firms take heat in Senate Commerce hearing scrutinizing surge
articles.description: Sports betting on firms such as Kalshi was the focus of questions over advertising to children, cheating from athletes and undermining regulated gaming.

articles.title: Jeff Bezos, you were so close to making a good point
articles.description: "Why is a nurse in Queens who makes $75,000 a year paying more than $1,000 a month in taxes?" Bezos said Wednesday morning on CNBC. "That's $1,000 that could help with rent, or groceries, or anything."

articles.title: Crypto custody firm Copper is looking to sell the company for $500 million
articles.description: Cantor Fitzgerald has been appointed to help with the sale, according to sources.

articles.title: The Protocol: Ethereum Foundation's high-profile departures spark fresh debate
articles.description: Also: Citi on quantum computing and bitcoin, Jump Crypto’s Firedancer, and Vitalik Buterin on AI verification

articles.title: Why Trump's bitcoin ETF plans likely collapsed before getting off the ground
articles.description: Trump Media withdrew its bitcoin ETF filing as analysts pointed to fee pressure, weak demand and fierce competition in the crowded spot bitcoin ETF market.

articles.title: Crypto Long & Short: Bitcoin-backed loans belong in the cost-of-capital conversation
articles.description: In this week’s Crypto Long & Short Newsletter, Alec Beckman on why BTC-backed lending is not a crypto story, but a capital efficiency story. Then, Serena Sebastiani on how stablecoins aren’t a crypto product; they’re becoming the settlement infrastructure global finance forgot.

articles.title: Bitcoin sees fresh US sell-off as markets await Nvidia 'biggest earnings event'
articles.description: Bitcoin struggles to overcome US selling pressure with markets on edge ahead of Nvidia's Q1 earnings report.

articles.title: Customers say Trump Mobile is leaking their personal information
articles.description: Trump Mobile is leaking customers’ email and home addresses but has not responded to people alerting the company of the data exposure, according to two YouTubers who said they verified that their leaked data is authentic.
